title: Euphorbiodendron calyculatum
taxonomy: Euphorbiodendron calyculatum is a species of flowering plant in the family Euphorbiaceae. It belongs to the order Malpighiales and the clade Rosidae. Within the family Euphorbiaceae, Euphorbiodendron calyculatum is classified under the subfamily Acalyphoideae. At the genus level, it is classified as Euphorbiodendron.
